prompt: Monochromatic logo design on pure black background. A perfect circle with a thick pure white (#FFFFFF) border ring (about 5% of diameter thickness). Inside the circle is solid black. In the center, the letters 'MM' in bold pure white (#FFFFFF) uppercase. CRITICAL: The typeface must be a bold, blocky, geometric extended sans-serif like Microgramma Extended Bold or Eurostile Bold Extended — wide letterforms, thick rectangular strokes, sharp 90-degree corners. Everything is pure white on black — no yellow, no gray, no color at all. Monochromatic. Clean vector quality, perfectly centered, razor sharp edges, flat design.
negative_prompt: yellow, color, colored, gradient, shadow, glow, neon, 3D, complex, busy, decorative, serif font, script font, thin lines, rounded font, soft font, realistic photo, photography, human, blur, low quality, pixelated, tagline, extra text, grunge, noise, texture, multiple fonts, mixed typefaces
